## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Packaging/release change

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `pi --no-extensions -e .`
- [ ] Other/manual validation:

## GuardMe security checklist

- [ ] I preserved deny-over-allow policy semantics.
- [ ] I considered `zeroAccessPaths`, `readOnlyPaths`, and `noDeletePaths` behavior.
- [ ] I considered non-UI fail-closed behavior for prompt-needed actions.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local `.pi/` state, GuardMe state JSONL, generated reports, package tarballs, or machine-local paths.
- [ ] I updated README/docs/specs when user-facing behavior changed.
